title: quercus × sterilis
intro: Quercus × sterilis, also known as the hybrid oak, is a rare and sterile deciduous tree resulting from the hybridization of the English oak (Quercus robur) and the sessile oak (Quercus petraea). The plant has been used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Quercus × sterilis include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and support the immune system. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be used to promote overall well-being and alleviate various health issues.
